data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of version control, specifically tracking which version of the waiver was signed. However, the evidence provided does not include any details or data points that confirm the implementation of version control for the signed waivers. The linked use case mentions the need for version control but does not provide any concrete evidence that this functionality is present or operational, leading to a clear gap in requirement satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of version control implementation for signed waivers.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
